title: realdata tests conditionally skip when Kaggle data absent
evidence: acceptance/realdata_test.go:19 t.Skipf("real Kaggle data not present at %s: %v", dir, err)
suggestion: Data is present in data/kaggle/ so skip would not trigger at runtime, but the skip clause exists in code

title: Low code coverage (32.1%) despite all tests passing
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.3213; defect_rate=1.0 confirms all tests pass. 36 test functions across 4 files but only ~32% line coverage of source
suggestion: Add tests for edge cases in CSV loading (soccer/load.go:141-309), error paths in tools.go handlers, and untested schema/protocol helpers
